heading: Witness fees
label: 7457 Witness fees
notes: Amendments1976—Subsec. (b)(1). struck out “or his delegate” after “Secretary” wherever appearing.Pub. L. 94–455
amendments: Amendments1976—Subsec. (b)(1). struck out “or his delegate” after “Secretary” wherever appearing.Pub. L. 94–455

children.heading: Amount
children.label: a Amount
children.text: Any witness summoned or whose deposition is taken under section 7456 shall receive the same fees and mileage as witnesses in courts of the United States.

children.heading: Witnesses for Secretary
children.label: 1 Witnesses for Secretary
children.text: In the case of witnesses for the Secretary, such payments shall be made by the Secretary out of any moneys appropriated for the collection of internal revenue taxes, and may be made in advance.

children.heading: Other Witnesses
children.label: 2 Other Witnesses
children.text: In the case of any other witnesses, such payments shall be made, subject to rules prescribed by the Tax Court, by the party at whose instance the witness appears or the deposition is taken.
